total_pnl.green: Trend consistent with validated expectancy band; no single-trade dominance >40% of week PnL.
total_pnl.caution: Flat to mildly negative while sample <20 trades OR fees dominate.
total_pnl.danger: Large negative week AND rising error counts OR breach of daily/weekly loss budget.

realized_pnl.green: Matches ledger reconciliation within tolerance; stable day-over-day variance vs model.
realized_pnl.caution: Spiky but explainable (events, gaps); reconciliation delayed <1h.
realized_pnl.danger: Mismatch vs venue OR unexplained jumps.

unrealized_pnl.green: Marks refresh < threshold latency; within risk per open position.
unrealized_pnl.caution: Stale marks >1 refresh cycle on illiquid legs only with documented widen.
unrealized_pnl.danger: Persistent stale marks OR unrealized breaching liquidation proximity rules.

fees_paid.danger: >0.40 sustained 15+ trades OR rising without throughput increase.

slippage.danger: > baseline * 1.5 for 10+ trades OR coverage missing_or_thin

win_rate.green: Within bootstrap CI consistent with strategy sim (not standalone target).
win_rate.caution: Deviates from sim but expectancy still positive post-fee.
win_rate.danger: Win rate collapses AND expectancy negative with min sample.

average_win.green: Stable vs historical R multiple; not fee-eaten.
average_win.danger: Avg win < avg loss magnitude with negative expectancy.

average_loss.green: Losses capped at policy max; tail flat.
average_loss.caution: Occasional tail beyond 1.5x median loss with documented cause.
average_loss.danger: Repeated tail losses without cause OR stop integrity failures.

expectancy.danger: <=0 with min 30 trades OR CI includes large negative

max_drawdown.danger: >3.5% OR faster than simulated max adverse excursion

capital_utilization_pct.green: 40–70% of deployable micro budget actively working with rest idle by design
capital_utilization_pct.caution: <20% idle by neglect OR >90% chronic without scaling gate approval

idle_capital_time.green: Idle matches low-signal regime with scanner health green
idle_capital_time.caution: Extended idle with scanner errors intermittent
idle_capital_time.danger: Idle due to silent failures OR halt loops

setup_type_breakdown.green: 1–2 dominant setups explain majority of positive expectancy
setup_type_breakdown.caution: many setups with thin counts each
setup_type_breakdown.danger: worst setup contributes large negative without suppression

product_breakdown.green: PnL variance explained; no orphan product spikes

time_of_day_breakdown.caution: new activity in thin windows without approval
time_of_day_breakdown.danger: loss cluster in thin liquidity with high slippage

cancelled_order_count.green: cancels correlate with benign replace logic

mission_pace_score.green: validation milestones on track without rushing trades
mission_pace_score.caution: behind pace but risk metrics green
mission_pace_score.danger: ahead on trades without validation OR behind with deteriorating metrics
